title: Economic substance for Jersey companies and partnerships
text:
Application of economic substance in Jersey

As part of its' international commitments Jersey has introduced economic substance requirements for relevant entities.

Legislation


   Taxation (Companies - Economic Substance) (Jersey) Law  
   

 
   Taxation (Partnerships - Economic Substance) (Jersey) Law

      Economic substance requirements guidance
